wiring.control_path: showHintButton === false → Hint button is not rendered; hint() function is unreachable. Existing behavior preserved exactly.
wiring.treatment_path: showHintButton === true → Hint button renders; hint() calls firstStepToward() BFS and surfaces a suggestion via feedback state.

notes: Flag 'hint-button' already existed in LaunchDarkly (idempotent reuse). FLAG_KEYS.hintButton and Flags['hint-button'] were pre-wired in packages/ld/src/flags.ts. Only App.tsx needed the useFlag evaluation and conditional render.
